case_title: NEWELL COLOR LAB, INC. DBA NEWELL COLOUR VS MARTINSON LOWELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $279.29 FILED BY NEWELL COLOR LAB, INC. DBA NEWELL COLOUR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINSON LOWELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
